title: Harvest
description: An Autumn/Fall texture pack for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 that adds warm seasonal colors.
body: A cozy Autumn/Fall texture pack for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 that fills your world with warm colors, rustic tones, and nostalgic seasonal charm. Leaves turn vibrant shades of orange and red, landscapes feel crisp and atmospheric, and every block gets a gentle fall makeover.
